name: metis
description: Cost-effective swarm orchestration for Claude Code. Parallel task execution, budget tracking, and intelligent triage across any project.

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: Budget-bounded orchestrator: frames a goal, plans with superpowers, dispatches isolated workers, verifies against a ground-truth oracle, and reports. Judgment-first, model-agnostic, superpowers-native. Successor to metis.

plugins.name: metis
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — superseded by conductor] Generic swarm orchestration — parallel task execution with automatic dependency management, budget tracking, and codebase-aware triage.

plugins.name: ios-qa
plugins.description: Spec-driven visual QA for iOS apps. Reads task specs, verifies acceptance criteria through the simulator, applies an opinionated User Complaint Filter, and fixes simple issues directly. Includes batch PR review and a session manager.
